summary: Completed testing of Phase 1 Feature #1: Project CRUD. All 12 backend API tests passed. All 6 frontend UI tests passed. Project creation, listing, updating, and deletion work correctly. Mobile-first layout verified at 390x844 viewport.
passed_tests: POST /api/projects - create audition project with all fields (title, role_name, mode, date, time, format) - PASS
POST /api/projects - create booked role project (no date/time/format) - PASS
POST /api/projects - create project with minimal fields (title only, defaults to audition mode) - PASS
GET /api/projects - list all projects sorted by updated_at DESC with document_count - PASS
GET /api/projects/{id} - get single project with documents array - PASS
GET /api/projects/{id} - returns 404 for non-existent project - PASS
PUT /api/projects/{id} - update project fields (title, role_name, selected_character) - PASS
PUT /api/projects/{id} - returns 404 for non-existent project - PASS
PUT /api/projects/{id} - returns 400 when no fields to update - PASS
DELETE /api/projects/{id} - delete project and verify removal - PASS
DELETE /api/projects/{id} - returns 404 for non-existent project - PASS
Full CRUD flow: Create → GET → Update → GET → Delete → GET - PASS
Home screen (ProjectHome) shows 'New Audition' and 'Booked Role' buttons - PASS
Clicking 'New Audition' opens ProjectCreate with audition-specific fields (date, time, format) - PASS
Clicking 'Booked Role' opens ProjectCreate WITHOUT date/time/format fields - PASS
Filling form and clicking 'Create Project' creates project and returns to home with new card visible - PASS
Delete button on project card removes the project with confirmation - PASS
Mobile viewport (390x844) layout - large touch targets (56px height), no horizontal overflow - PASS
Back button navigation from create screen to home - PASS
critical_code_review_comments: server.py lines 935-1021: Project CRUD endpoints well-implemented with proper validation, MongoDB persistence, and error handling
CreateProjectRequest (line 935-941) correctly defines all fields with Optional types for audition-specific fields
UpdateProjectRequest (line 944-951) allows partial updates with proper field validation
GET /api/projects (line 976-982) correctly adds document_count for each project
DELETE /api/projects/{id} (line 1013-1021) properly deletes associated documents before project
ProjectHome.jsx uses proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
ProjectCreate.jsx correctly conditionally renders audition-specific fields based on mode prop
seed_data_creation: Test projects created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Project CRUD (Phase 1 Feature #1) fully tested. Key endpoints: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/projects. Frontend components: ProjectHome.jsx (home screen with project list), ProjectCreate.jsx (create form). Data-testid attributes: project-home, new-audition-btn, new-booked-btn, empty-state, project-card-{id}, delete-project-{id}, project-create, project-title-input, role-name-input, audition-date-input, audition-time-input, format-self-tape, format-in-person, create-project-btn, create-back-btn. Existing project in DB: 'Netflix Drama Callback' with role 'Felix'.

create_audition_project.details: POST /api/projects creates audition project with title, role_name, mode='audition', audition_date, audition_time, audition_format

create_booked_project.details: POST /api/projects creates booked project with mode='booked', null date/time/format fields

list_projects.details: GET /api/projects returns all projects sorted by updated_at DESC with document_count

get_single_project.details: GET /api/projects/{id} returns project with documents array

update_project.details: PUT /api/projects/{id} updates specified fields and updates updated_at timestamp

delete_project.details: DELETE /api/projects/{id} removes project and associated documents

home_screen_buttons.details: New Audition and Booked Role buttons visible and functional

audition_create_form.details: Shows date, time, and format fields for audition mode

booked_create_form.details: Hides date, time, and format fields for booked mode

project_cards.details: Cards show mode badge, title, role, date (if audition), document count

delete_confirmation.details: Delete button shows confirmation dialog before removing project

mobile_layout.details: Touch targets 56px height (>44px minimum), no horizontal overflow at 390x844
